package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_quadratic_append_filter_pipeline: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag append-based filter pipelines that rescan accumulated results for every input item.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule500PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario500Positive(records []Rule500PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
